compiled_state.title: RED: Add test assertions for artifact review before writing
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Add test assertions to BOTH test-onboarding-skill.sh AND test-architect-foundation-skill.sh that validate artifact review behavior: skill presents artifacts for user approval before writing, and shows diffs against existing files.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh

## New Test Assertions
For test-onboarding-skill.sh:
1. test_artifact_review_before_writing: SKILL.md must instruct presenting artifacts before writing — grep for 'review.*before.*writ' or 'approval.*before.*writ' or 'present.*artifact'
2. test_diff_existing_files: SKILL.md must instruct showing diffs for existing files — grep for 'diff.*existing' or 'existing.*diff'

For test-architect-foundation-skill.sh:
3. test_artifact_review_before_writing: same pattern as above
4. test_diff_existing_files: same pattern as above

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] New tests fail against current SKILL.md (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — both test files run: onboarding 40 PASS / 2 FAIL (new RED tests), architect-foundation 14 PASS / 2 FAIL (new RED tests)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: ACs verified ✓ — AC2 confirmed: onboarding has 2 FAIL (new RED tests), architect-foundation has 2 FAIL (new RED tests), all existing tests PASS. AC1 (run-all.sh) unchanged — bash skill tests are standalone/not in run-all.sh. Exit 144 on run-all.sh is pre-existing timeout per KNOWN-ISSUES (CLAUDE.md rule 23).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
